theme: Nova rate limiting causing enterprise customer lockout plus Atlas final delivery sign-off day

events.text: CRITICAL: Nexum enterprise account locked out — rate limiter blocking all API calls, 0% success rate since 14:48
NOVA-801 Critical — Nexum enterprise account rate limited, all API calls blocked, customer CS team on phone
test: validate Nexum account rate limit config — check per-account threshold vs enterprise tier limit
Infra: Nexum hitting 500 requests per minute — rate limiter set at 200 RPM for their account tier
NOVA-802 opened — Nexum provisioned on Standard tier limit (200 RPM) but purchased Enterprise tier (2,000 RPM)
PM: Nexum upgraded to Enterprise 6 weeks ago — rate limit config never updated in production
Subject: Nexum account lockout — urgent | Body: Nexum enterprise account rate limited, billing shows Enterprise plan active since Feb 18, config mismatch
Nexum CTO Dilnoza calling — their end-of-quarter reporting pipeline has been blocked for 12 minutes, missing SLA deadline
fix: update Nexum account rate limit from 200 RPM to 2,000 RPM in rate-limiter config
NOVA-803 — rate limit config fix deploying to production, ETA 3 minutes
Engineering: fix deployed — Nexum rate limit now 2,000 RPM, unlocking account
Nexum API calls succeeding — 100% success rate restored at 15:03, 15-minute lockout total
NOVA-801 resolved — Nexum unlocked at 15:03, 15-minute lockout, SLA breach being assessed
PM calling Dilnoza (Nexum CTO) — apologising for lockout, assessing if their SLA deadline was missed
Subject: Nexum account restored | Body: Rate limit corrected to Enterprise tier 2,000 RPM, account restored at 15:03, call with CTO scheduled
Final delivery sign-off day — client reviewing all 6 deliverables for acceptance sign-off by 17:00
